questions.statement: <p>Vidarbha clinched their first-ever Vijay Hazare Trophy title in the 2026 final. This match was held in which city?</p>
Which handwoven fabric from Srikakulam district, Andhra Pradesh, has been granted the Geographical Indication (GI) tag?
Which state/UT recently signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the Ministry of Earth Sciences (MoES) to bolster the Blue Economy, marine research, and coastal resilience?​
An annual nationwide Mass Drug Administration (MDA) campaign for __________ elimination was recently launched across _______ endemic states/UTs.
<div><span style="">Who has been appointed as the first woman Chief Secretary of Odisha, marking a historic milestone in the state&#39;s administration?</span></div>
